notes: HAR-313 extends the captured Files API mutation evidence with runtime-backed local coverage for top-level `files`, empty `fileSavedSearches`, and inert `stagedUploadsCreate` target metadata. The checked-in live captures prove Files API file payload shapes and ready-state polling around create/update/delete; the runtime test enforces the local read/upload side-effect boundary while exact live staged-upload storage parameters remain intentionally looser because the proxy must not create external upload storage at runtime.
